title: Property Consultant - Savills India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Savills India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!
